name: Beagle's Bagels
description: Beagle's Bagels are our peanut butter–packed classic — small, crunchy, and perfect for everyday treating. Made in small batches with simple ingredients in bagel-shaped bites, they're easy to break, easy to love, and a favorite with pups. Great for training, behavior rewards, or casual snacking.
shortDescription: Peanut butter–packed bagel-shaped bites. Small-batch, crunchy, and perfect for everyday treating.
ingredients: Peanuts, Whole Wheat Flour, Cinnamon, Baking Powder

sizeOptions.label: Regular
sizeOptions.hint: Perfect for medium and large dogs. Great for casual snacking and rewards.

sizeOptions.label: Mini
sizeOptions.hint: Cheerio-sized! Ideal for small dogs, puppies, and training treats.

name: Lucy's Loopies
description: Playful, ring-shaped treats with a hint of apple flavor and a satisfying crunch. These colorful loops are designed for dogs who appreciate variety — convenient to portion, fun to give, and special enough to make every treat moment count.
shortDescription: Ring-shaped treats with a hint of apple flavor. Colorful, crunchy, and easy to portion.
ingredients: Oat Flour, Apples, Beet Powder, Blue Spirulina, Cheddar Cheese Powder

name: Winston's Woofles
description: Light, crunchy waffle-style treats made with real cheesy goodness. These bite-sized treats have a soft crunch dogs love and are perfect for daily rewards, training sessions, or sneaking one into your pocket before a walk. A staple in our treat jars — and once your dog tries them, they'll be a staple in yours too.
shortDescription: Waffle-style treats with real cheesy goodness. Light, crunchy, and perfect for training.

sizeOptions.label: Regular
sizeOptions.hint: Perfect for medium and large dogs. Great for casual snacking and rewards.

sizeOptions.label: Mini
sizeOptions.hint: Cheerio-sized! Ideal for small dogs, puppies, and training treats.

name: Moose's Medley
description: Can't pick just one flavor? Neither can Moose. Our most popular mix — Peanut Butter, Cheese, and Apple all in one bag. Small-batch baked, big-time approved.
shortDescription: Our most popular mix — Peanut Butter, Cheese, and Apple all in one bag.
ingredients: Bagels: Peanuts, Whole Wheat Flour, Cinnamon, Baking Powder | Woofles: Almond Flour, Cheese Blend | Loopies: Oat Flour, Apples, Beet Powder, Blue Spirulina, Cheddar Cheese Powder
